allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); simple=[e for e in d if e['type']=='simple']; print\('Total:', len\(d\)\); print\('Simple:', len\(simple\)\); print\('Familles simple:', {e['family'] for e in simple}\); [print\(f\\"  {e['id']}: {e['family']}/{e['valence']}/{e['gender']}\\"\) for e in simple]")
Bash(node -e "const m=require\('marked'\); console.log\(typeof m.marked, typeof m.parse, Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,8\)\)")
